goal: Add search methods to BookmarkStore in models.py: search(query) -> list[Bookmark] that searches in both url and title (case-insensitive substring match), and search_by_tag(tag) -> list[Bookmark] that returns bookmarks containing the given tag (case-insensitive). Include type hints.
verify: python3 -c 'import os; os.remove("test_search.json") if os.path.exists("test_search.json") else None; from models import BookmarkStore; s=BookmarkStore("test_search.json"); s.add("https://github.com","GitHub",["dev","code"]); s.add("https://google.com","Google",["search"]); assert len(s.search("git"))==1; assert len(s.search("GOOGLE"))==1; assert len(s.search_by_tag("dev"))==1; assert len(s.search_by_tag("DEV"))==1; os.remove("test_search.json"); print("search OK")'
